title: leucanthemum depressum
intro: Leucanthemum depressum, also known as the daisy-like wild pansy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Leucanthemum depressum are said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Leucanthemum depressum can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
